families.name: Korvanto Bentonite
families.short: Premium bentonite grades for drilling, foundry, civil, feed, fertilizer, litter, paper, pharma, cosmetic, desiccant, seal, food, pencil and specialty applications.

families.name: Korvanto Kaolin (China Clay)
families.short: Kaolin grades including crude, levigated noodles & lumps, hydrous, spray dried, calcined and metakaolin for ceramics, paints, paper, plastics and construction.

families.name: Korvanto Ball Clay
families.short: Premium ball clay for ceramic, sanitaryware, tile, porcelain and refractory manufacturing.

families.name: Korvanto Laterite
families.short: Iron and alumina-rich lateritic mineral for cement manufacturing, construction materials, road infrastructure and industrial applications.

families.name: Korvanto Chamotte
families.short: Calcined refractory chamotte — grades LF42, LF46, LF54, LF60, LF70 for fire bricks, castables and high-temperature applications.

families.name: Korvanto Bauxite
families.short: Premium calcined bauxite for refractory, abrasive and high-temperature applications — grades CB80, CB82, CB86.

families.name: Korvanto Carbon
families.short: Premium lustrous carbon additive for green sand foundry applications — grades CA, LCA, HLCA, and CS.

portfolio_page.title: Products | Korvanto
portfolio_page.description: Korvanto product portfolio — Bentonite, Kaolin, Ball Clay, Laterite, Chamotte, Bauxite and Carbon industrial mineral families for global B2B export.
portfolio_page.hero_lead: Explore Korvanto's branded industrial mineral families — each supplied with specification clarity, export packaging, documentation support and B2B dispatch coordination.
portfolio_page.section_lead: Premium industrial minerals and raw materials for international B2B buyers — specification-focused sourcing, export-ready packaging and coordinated shipment execution.

drill_category_description: KORVANTO BENTO DRILL is a range of high-quality drilling-grade bentonite products developed for oil & gas, water well, HDD, geothermal, piling, and geotechnical drilling applications. Available in API and OCMA grades, these products provide excellent viscosity, gel strength, borehole stability, fluid loss control, and cuttings suspension for efficient drilling operations worldwide.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Foundry
products.subtitle: High-Performance Bentonite for Foundry & Green Sand Casting

overview: KORVANTO BENTO FOUNDRY is a premium-grade sodium and blended bentonite developed for green sand molding applications in ferrous and non-ferrous foundries. Carefully processed to deliver excellent bonding strength, thermal stability, plasticity, and sand reusability, it helps produce strong molds with superior dimensional accuracy and surface finish.

Designed for modern foundry operations, our foundry bentonite improves mold integrity, reduces casting defects, enhances sand system performance, and supports consistent production across both manual and automated molding lines.
key_benefits: Improved Mold Edge Strength and Definition
Reduced Casting Defects such as Scabbing, Erosion, and Blowholes
Better Sand Reusability and Lower Consumption
Consistent Performance in High-Pressure Molding Systems
Suitable for Both Ferrous and Non-Ferrous Castings
applications: KORVANTO BENTO FOUNDRY is widely used in:
product_features: Superior Green and Dry Mold Strength
Effective Performance at Lower Addition Levels
product_advantages: Produces strong and durable molds with excellent bonding properties
Improves green strength and wet tensile strength of molding sand
Reduces casting defects such as scabbing, erosion, and blowholes
Enhances mold surface finish and casting quality
Provides excellent thermal stability during metal pouring
Improves dimensional accuracy of cast components
Supports higher sand reusability and lower consumption
Develops effective mold strength at lower addition levels
Suitable for both manual and automated molding systems
Helps improve foundry productivity and process consistency
Website Category Description (for KORVANTO BENTO DRILL)

KORVANTO BENTO DRILL is a range of high-quality drilling-grade bentonite products developed for oil & gas, water well, HDD, geothermal, piling, and geotechnical drilling applications. Available in API and OCMA grades, these products provide excellent viscosity, gel strength, borehole stability, fluid loss control, and cuttings suspension for efficient drilling operations worldwide.
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom foundry grades can be supplied according to casting type, sand system requirements, and foundry operating conditions.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Drilling API
products.subtitle: API 13A Grade Bentonite for Oil, Gas & Industrial Drilling

overview: KORVANTO BENTO DRILL API is a high-performance sodium bentonite manufactured to meet API 13A specifications for drilling fluid applications. Processed from carefully selected bentonite deposits, it delivers excellent viscosity, gel strength, suspension characteristics, and fluid loss control required for demanding drilling operations.

When mixed with water, it forms a stable thixotropic drilling mud that helps maintain borehole stability, transports drill cuttings to the surface, cools and lubricates drilling equipment, and minimizes fluid loss into surrounding formations. Its consistent performance makes it suitable for both onshore and offshore drilling environments.
key_benefits: Excellent gel strength and suspension properties
Enhanced drill bit cooling and lubrication
Consistent performance in challenging drilling conditions
product_advantages: API 13A compliant performance for demanding drilling operations
Develops high viscosity and strong gel strength
Provides excellent borehole stabilization
Improves suspension and transportation of drill cuttings
Reduces fluid loss into permeable formations
Enhances drilling efficiency and penetration rates
Lubricates and cools drilling equipment
Suitable for onshore and offshore drilling environments
Delivers consistent mud properties and field performance
Helps minimize operational downtime and drilling costs

products.name: Korvanto Bento Drilling OCMA
products.subtitle: OCMA Grade Bentonite for Drilling Fluid Systems

overview: KORVANTO BENTO DRILL OCMA is a premium drilling-grade bentonite manufactured in accordance with OCMA (Oil Companies Materials Association) specifications. Designed for use in water-based drilling mud systems, it provides reliable rheological properties, good suspension characteristics, and effective borehole support for a wide range of drilling operations.

The product forms a stable drilling fluid that assists in transporting cuttings, sealing permeable formations, reducing fluid loss, and improving drilling efficiency. Its cost-effective performance makes it a preferred choice for water well, geotechnical, and industrial drilling applications.
product_advantages: Manufactured to meet OCMA drilling fluid requirements
Provides reliable viscosity and suspension characteristics
Supports effective borehole wall stabilization
Improves cuttings removal and hole cleaning efficiency
Reduces seepage and fluid loss during drilling
Offers good lubrication and cooling performance
Suitable for water well, geotechnical, and industrial drilling
Easy slurry preparation and field application
Cost-effective solution for drilling fluid systems
Consistent quality for dependable drilling performance

products.name: Korvanto Bento Iron Ore Pelletization
products.subtitle: Bentonite for Iron Ore Pelletization (IOP)

overview: KORVANTO BENTO IOP is a premium-grade bentonite specially developed for iron ore pelletization applications. Produced from carefully selected bentonite deposits and processed to deliver consistent performance, it acts as an effective binder in the conversion of iron ore fines into strong, uniform pellets for blast furnace and direct reduction iron (DRI) processes.

Its high swelling capacity, excellent water absorption, and superior bonding characteristics help produce pellets with outstanding green strength, dry strength, and fired strength while maintaining low bentonite consumption. The result is improved pellet quality, reduced breakage, enhanced handling efficiency, and optimized steel production performance.
key_benefits: High Dry and Fired Pellet Strength
Superior Binding Efficiency at Low Dosage
High Water Absorption and Swelling Capacity
Improved Pellet Integrity and Reduced Breakage
Enhanced Handling, Transportation, and Storage Performance
Reduced Dust Generation and Pellet Losses
Reliable Performance in Modern Pellet Plants
applications: KORVANTO BENTO IOP is widely used in:
Iron Ore Beneficiation and Agglomeration Processes
Pelletizing of Iron Ore Concentrates and Fines
product_features: Strong Green and Dry Bond Development
Suitable for Iron Ore Pellet Manufacturing
product_advantages: Delivers superior green, dry, and fired pellet strength
Promotes uniform pellet formation and size consistency
Reduces pellet breakage during handling and transportation
Provides excellent bonding at low dosage levels
Enhances pellet durability throughout the pelletizing process
Improves thermal stability during induration and firing
Supports efficient blast furnace and DRI operations
Reduces dust generation and material losses
Improves pellet plant productivity and operational efficiency
Ensures consistent pellet quality for steel manufacturing
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom pelletizing grades and tailored specifications can be supplied according to iron ore characteristics and pellet plant requirements.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Civil
products.subtitle: High-Yield Bentonite for Piling, Diaphragm Walling, HDD & Civil Engineering Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO CIVIL is a premium-grade sodium bentonite specially engineered for civil engineering, foundation, and construction projects. Processed from high-quality bentonite and optimized for superior rheological performance, it develops a stable thixotropic slurry that provides excellent excavation support, borehole stabilization, and seepage control.

When mixed with water, it forms a high-yield suspension capable of penetrating soil voids, sealing permeable formations, and creating a protective filter cake that stabilizes excavation walls. Its exceptional water absorption, swelling capacity, and gel strength make it ideal for demanding piling, trenching, tunneling, and foundation applications.
Designed for modern construction projects, KORVANTO BENTO CIVIL delivers reliable performance, improved operational efficiency, and reduced excavation risks.
key_benefits: Reduces Risk of Collapse During Construction
Forms Effective Filter Cake for Seepage Control
Delivers Consistent Performance on Large Infrastructure Projects
applications: KORVANTO BENTO CIVIL is widely used in:
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom civil engineering bentonite grades can be supplied according to project specifications, soil conditions, slurry requirements, and engineering standards.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Cattle Feed
products.subtitle: High-Purity Bentonite for Animal Feed & Mycotoxin Management

overview: KORVANTO BENTO FEED is a high-purity bentonite specially processed for use in livestock, poultry, aquaculture, and animal nutrition applications. With excellent adsorption capacity, high cation exchange properties, and natural binding characteristics, it functions as an effective mycotoxin binder, pellet binder, and anti-caking agent in animal feed formulations.

Designed to improve feed quality and safety, KORVANTO BENTO FEED helps reduce the harmful effects of mycotoxins such as aflatoxins, supports feed stability during storage and handling, and enhances pellet durability. Its natural detoxifying properties contribute to improved feed efficiency, better nutrient utilization, and overall animal performance.

Suitable for use in cattle, poultry, swine, sheep, goat, and aquaculture feed, KORVANTO BENTO FEED is manufactured under strict quality controls to ensure consistent performance and low impurity levels.
key_benefits: Helps Reduce Mycotoxin Contamination in Feed
Reduces Feed Losses and Dust Formation
Helps Maintain Consistent Feed Production Quality
applications: KORVANTO BENTO FEED is widely used in:
product_advantages: Acts as an effective natural mycotoxin binder
Helps reduce the impact of aflatoxins and other feed contaminants
Improves feed safety and overall feed quality
Enhances pellet strength and durability during feed manufacturing
Prevents feed caking and improves flowability
Supports better storage stability and shelf life
Reduces feed losses caused by dusting and breakage
Improves feed handling and processing efficiency
Suitable for livestock, poultry, aquaculture, and pet food applications
Provides a natural and cost-effective solution for feed formulations
key_features: Large Surface Area for Toxin Adsorption
Low Moisture and Controlled Impurity Levels
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom feed-grade bentonite specifications can be supplied according to feed formulation and manufacturing requirements.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Fertilizer
products.subtitle: Bentonite for Fertilizer Manufacturing, Soil Conditioning & Agricultural Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO FERT is a premium-grade sodium bentonite specially developed for fertilizer and agricultural applications. Its unique combination of high swelling capacity, moisture retention, cation exchange capability, and binding properties makes it an effective additive for fertilizer granulation, nutrient retention, and soil improvement.

Used extensively in NPK, DAP, urea, sulfur bentonite, micronutrient, organic, and bio-fertilizer formulations, KORVANTO BENTO FERT improves granule strength, reduces dust generation, enhances fertilizer efficiency, and promotes controlled nutrient release. It also acts as a natural soil conditioner by improving water-holding capacity, soil structure, and nutrient availability.
As an eco-friendly mineral additive, it supports sustainable agricultural practices while helping maximize fertilizer performance and crop productivity.
key_benefits: Improves Fertilizer Granule Strength and Durability
Reduces Dust Formation and Product Losses
Supports Controlled and Gradual Nutrient Release
Supports Better Root Development and Plant Growth
applications: KORVANTO BENTO FERT is widely used in:
Carrier for Micronutrients and Agricultural Inputs
product_advantages: Acts as an Effective Granulation Agent
Improves Shelf Life and Storage Stability of Fertilizers
Enhances Soil Fertility and Nutrient Availability
Supports Microbial Activity in Soil
Improves Sandy Soil Performance and Moisture Retention
Suitable for Both Conventional and Sustainable Farming Practices
Eco-Friendly and Naturally Occurring Mineral Product
key_features: Good Carrier for Micronutrients and Fertilizer Additives
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom fertilizer bentonite grades can be supplied according to fertilizer formulation, granulation process requirements, swelling characteristics, and customer specifications.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Cat Litter
products.subtitle: Premium Bentonite for Cat Litter Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO LITTER is a high-quality natural bentonite specially processed for cat litter applications. With exceptional water absorption, rapid clumping ability, and natural odor control properties, it provides a clean, hygienic, and convenient litter solution for pet care manufacturers and private label brands.

When exposed to moisture, the bentonite granules quickly absorb liquid and form strong, stable clumps that can be easily removed while leaving the remaining litter fresh and reusable. Its superior absorption capacity helps control odors, reduce waste, and maintain a cleaner litter box environment.
Available in various granule sizes and customized formulations, KORVANTO BENTO LITTER can be supplied with or without fragrances to meet diverse market requirements.
key_benefits: Helps Maintain a Cleaner Litter Box
Keeps Unused Litter Fresh for Longer
Made from Naturally Occurring Mineral Resources
applications: KORVANTO BENTO LITTER is widely used in:
product_advantages: Absorbs Multiple Times Its Own Weight in Liquid
Produces Strong and Cohesive Clumps
Supports Easy Scooping and Disposal
Naturally Controls Moisture and Odors
Does Not Support Bacterial Growth Due to Drying Action
Environmentally Friendly and Inert Mineral Material
Customizable Granule Size, Absorption Rate, and Fragrance Options
documentation: Independent Third-Party Testing Available Upon Request
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom cat litter bentonite grades can be supplied based on granule size distribution, absorption capacity, clumping strength, color requirements, and private label manufacturing specifications.

grades.name: KORVANTO BENTO LITTER L-25
grades.subtitle: Cat Litter Grade Bentonite Granules (0.5 – 2.5 mm)

products.name: Korvanto Bento Paper & Deink
products.subtitle: Bentonite for Paper Manufacturing, Pulp Processing & Deinking Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO PAPER & DEINK is a premium-grade sodium bentonite specially processed for the pulp, paper, and recycled paper industries. Its unique thixotropic properties, high surface area, and excellent cation exchange capacity make it an effective retention aid, drainage aid, formation aid, and deinking additive.

In paper manufacturing, it improves fiber and filler retention, enhances sheet formation, optimizes drainage, and contributes to better paper strength and surface quality. In deinking operations, it assists in the removal of ink particles, sticky contaminants, fines, and dissolved impurities from recycled paper pulp, helping improve process efficiency and final paper quality.

Carefully processed to maintain low sand content and consistent particle size distribution, KORVANTO BENTO PAPER & DEINK supports smoother machine operation, reduced downtime, and improved productivity in both virgin pulp and recycled fiber systems.
key_benefits: Improves Fiber, Filler, and Fine Particle Retention
Enhances Paper Formation and Sheet Uniformity
Increases Paper Strength and Surface Quality
Reduces Loss of Valuable Raw Materials
Supports Efficient Ink and Contaminant Removal
Minimizes Sticky Deposits and Pitch Problems
Improves Productivity in Virgin and Recycled Paper Production
product_advantages: Enhances Retention and Drainage Performance
Improves Paper Quality and Production Efficiency
Supports Cleaner and More Efficient Recycling Processes
Effective in Both Virgin and Recycled Fiber Systems
Helps Control Pitch and Sticky Contaminants
Improves Dewatering and Water Management
Compatible with Modern Paper Chemical Programs
Low Consumption with High Performance
Consistent Quality and Reliable Results
Cost-Effective Solution for Paper and Deinking Operations
key_features: Compatible with Cationic and Anionic Polymer Systems
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom paper-grade and de-inking bentonite can be manufactured according to particle size distribution, brightness, retention performance, and application requirements.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Pharma
products.subtitle: High-Purity Bentonite for Pharmaceutical, Healthcare & Personal Care Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO PHARMA is a high-purity bentonite specially processed for pharmaceutical, healthcare, nutraceutical, and personal care applications. Carefully selected and refined to ensure consistent quality, it offers excellent adsorption, suspension, swelling, and binding properties required in a wide range of formulations.

Its unique mineral structure and high surface area make it an effective suspending agent, stabilizer, binder, thickening agent, and rheology modifier in pharmaceutical preparations. The product is suitable for use in tablets, capsules, suspensions, topical formulations, herbal products, and other healthcare applications where product stability and consistency are essential.
Manufactured under stringent quality controls, KORVANTO BENTO PHARMA delivers reliable performance for pharmaceutical and allied industries.
product_advantages: Improves Stability of Pharmaceutical Formulations
Functions as an Effective Suspending Agent
Enhances Uniform Distribution of Active Ingredients
Provides Reliable Binding Properties in Solid Formulations
Supports Consistent Viscosity and Rheological Control
Improves Product Texture and Dispersion Characteristics
Suitable for Both Liquid and Semi-Solid Preparations
Compatible with Various Pharmaceutical and Herbal Formulations
Natural Mineral-Based Functional Ingredient
Consistent Performance in Industrial Manufacturing Processes
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom pharmaceutical-grade bentonite can be supplied according to customer specifications, purity requirements, particle size distribution, swelling characteristics, and regulatory needs.

specifications.value: Insoluble in water, methanol, ether & acetone; very slightly soluble in hot & cold water

products.name: Korvanto Bento Cosmetic
products.subtitle: High-Purity Bentonite for Cosmetics, Personal Care & Beauty Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO COSMETIC is a premium-quality bentonite specially processed for cosmetic, skincare, haircare, and personal care applications. Derived from carefully selected natural bentonite deposits, it offers excellent absorption, adsorption, thickening, suspension, and rheological properties that make it a versatile ingredient in a wide range of beauty and personal care formulations.

Rich in naturally occurring minerals, KORVANTO BENTO COSMETIC helps absorb excess oil, impurities, and surface contaminants while improving product texture, stability, and application performance. Its fine particle size and smooth dispersion characteristics make it suitable for facial masks, cleansers, creams, lotions, shampoos, hair masks, and color cosmetic formulations.
Widely used by cosmetic manufacturers, the product contributes to enhanced formulation stability, improved sensory feel, and consistent product quality.
product_advantages: Helps Absorb Excess Oil and Surface Impurities
Improves Texture and Consistency of Cosmetic Products
Enhances Stability of Creams, Lotions, and Emulsions
Supports Uniform Pigment and Active Ingredient Distribution
Improves Product Spreadability and Application
Provides Effective Thickening and Suspension Performance
Helps Maintain Product Homogeneity During Storage
Suitable for a Wide Range of Cosmetic Formulations
Natural and Mineral-Based Functional Ingredient
Delivers Consistent Manufacturing Performance
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom cosmetic-grade bentonite can be supplied according to particle size requirements, montmorillonite content, moisture levels, adsorption performance, and end-use formulation requirements.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Desiccant
products.subtitle: High-Absorption Bentonite Granules for Moisture Control & Packaging Protection

overview: KORVANTO BENTO DESICCANT is a premium-grade bentonite specially processed into high-performance desiccant granules for moisture control applications. Manufactured from carefully selected bentonite with excellent adsorption characteristics, it effectively absorbs water vapor from enclosed environments, helping protect products from moisture damage during storage and transportation.

With its high surface area, natural adsorption capacity, and controlled particle size distribution, KORVANTO BENTO DESICCANT provides reliable humidity control for a wide range of packaging applications. It helps prevent corrosion, mold growth, product deterioration, and moisture-related quality issues while extending product shelf life.
As a natural and environmentally friendly alternative to synthetic desiccants, it offers an economical solution for moisture-sensitive goods across multiple industries.
product_advantages: Protects Products from Moisture Damage
Helps Prevent Corrosion, Rust, and Oxidation
Reduces Risk of Mold, Mildew, and Fungal Growth
Extends Product Shelf Life
Maintains Product Quality During Storage and Transit
Suitable for Long-Distance Export Shipments
Cost-Effective Alternative to Synthetic Desiccants
Easy to Use in Sachets, Pouches, and Bulk Applications
Natural and Eco-Friendly Moisture Control Solution
Reliable Performance Across Diverse Climatic Conditions
short_website_description: KORVANTO BENTO DESICCANT is a natural bentonite-based moisture adsorbent designed for packaging and storage applications. Its superior water vapor absorption and controlled granule size help protect products from humidity, corrosion, mold, and moisture-related damage during storage and transportation.
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom desiccant bentonite grades are available in various granule sizes, moisture absorption capacities, packaging formats, and application-specific requirements.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Pond Seal
products.subtitle: Bentonite for Pond Sealing, Water Retention & Seepage Control

overview: KORVANTO BENTO SEAL is a premium-grade natural sodium bentonite specially developed for pond sealing, water containment, and seepage control applications. Owing to its exceptional swelling and water absorption properties, the bentonite expands upon hydration to form a dense, low-permeability barrier that effectively minimizes water loss through soil.

When mixed with suitable soils, KORVANTO BENTO SEAL creates a durable and self-healing seal that helps retain water in ponds, reservoirs, lagoons, canals, and other water containment structures. Its natural rehydration and re-swelling characteristics enable long-term performance, making it an economical and environmentally friendly alternative to synthetic liners.
Suitable for both new construction and leak remediation projects, KORVANTO BENTO SEAL provides reliable water retention while preserving the natural characteristics of the site.
product_advantages: Effectively Reduces Water Seepage and Leakage
Creates a Durable Waterproof Barrier
Helps Maintain Water Levels in Ponds and Reservoirs
Natural and Environmentally Friendly Solution
Safe for Aquaculture, Livestock, and Wildlife Applications
Cost-Effective Alternative to Synthetic Liners
Easy Application and Installation
Supports Long-Term Water Conservation
Self-Healing Properties Help Seal Minor Cracks and Voids
Suitable for Both New Pond Construction and Leak Repair
key_features: Available in Powder and Granular Forms
short_website_description: KORVANTO BENTO SEAL is a premium natural sodium bentonite designed for pond sealing and water containment applications. Its exceptional swelling and sealing properties create a durable low-permeability barrier that minimizes seepage and helps retain water in ponds, reservoirs, canals, and aquaculture systems.
documentation: Independent Third-Party Testing Available Upon Request
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom pond sealant bentonite grades can be supplied based on swelling requirements, permeability specifications, particle size distribution, and project-specific performance requirements.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Food
products.subtitle: Food & Beverage Grade Bentonite for Wine Clarification, Beverage Purification & Processing Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO FOOD is a high-purity food-grade bentonite specially processed for beverage clarification, purification, and filtration applications. Predominantly composed of montmorillonite clay, it possesses a naturally high adsorption capacity and negative surface charge that enables the effective removal of suspended particles, proteins, impurities, and haze-forming compounds from liquid systems.

Widely used in wine, fruit juice, beverage, edible oil, and food processing industries, KORVANTO BENTO FOOD improves product clarity, stability, appearance, and shelf life while preserving the desired sensory characteristics of the final product. Its excellent swelling and adsorption properties make it an efficient and reliable clarifying agent for modern food and beverage processing operations.
Carefully processed under strict quality controls, the product is designed to deliver consistent performance and reliable clarification efficiency across a variety of food-grade applications.
applications: Food and Beverage Quality Enhancement Programs
product_advantages: Improves Clarity and Visual Appearance of Beverages
Effectively Removes Haze-Forming Proteins and Suspended Particles
Enhances Product Stability During Storage and Transportation
Supports Consistent Beverage Quality
Improves Filtration and Processing Efficiency
Helps Reduce Sedimentation and Turbidity Issues
Natural Mineral-Based Clarification Solution
Suitable for Vegan-Friendly Processing Systems
Easy Dispersion and Application in Processing Operations
Reliable and Cost-Effective Purification Performance
key_features: Suitable for Food and Beverage Processing Applications
short_website_description: KORVANTO BENTO FOOD is a premium food-grade bentonite used for beverage clarification and purification applications. Its superior adsorption and clarification properties help remove proteins, suspended particles, and impurities, improving product clarity, stability, and processing efficiency in wine, juice, and food manufacturing industries.

products.name: Korvanto Bento Pencil
products.subtitle: Bentonite for Pencil Lead Manufacturing & Graphite Bonding Applications

overview: KORVANTO BENTO PENCIL is a premium-grade bentonite specially developed for the pencil manufacturing industry. Produced from carefully selected bentonite deposits with high montmorillonite content, it serves as an effective binder in the production of pencil leads, providing the strength, cohesion, and workability required during extrusion, drying, and firing processes.

Its superior binding characteristics, high water absorption capacity, and excellent green and dry strength properties help produce pencil leads with consistent shape, smooth writing performance, and reduced breakage. The fine particle size and high surface area enable efficient bonding of graphite and other lead-forming materials while maintaining dimensional stability throughout manufacturing.
KORVANTO BENTO PENCIL is designed to support efficient production, improved lead quality, and reduced rejection rates in modern pencil manufacturing operations.
product_advantages: Provides Strong and Uniform Graphite Bonding
Improves Pencil Lead Strength and Durability
Supports Smooth Extrusion During Manufacturing
Enhances Shape Retention and Dimensional Stability
Reduces Lead Breakage During Production and Use
Promotes Fast Bond Development
Minimizes Manufacturing Rejections and Waste
Enables Consistent Pencil Lead Quality
Effective Performance at Lower Addition Levels
Improves Overall Production Efficiency
key_features: Fine and Uniform Particle Size Distribution
short_website_description: KORVANTO BENTO PENCIL is a high-performance bentonite developed for pencil lead manufacturing. Its excellent binding, strength, and water absorption properties help produce durable, uniform pencil leads with reduced breakage and improved manufacturing efficiency.
sections.custom_grade_note: Custom grades and tailored specifications can be supplied based on pencil formulation requirements and customer specifications.
sections.available_forms_lead: Premium bentonite for pencil lead manufacturing, supplied as a finely processed powder grade for binding and extrusion applications.

products.name: Korvanto Crude Kaolin
products.subtitle: Crude Kaolin (China Clay) for Ceramic, Paint, Paper, Plastic & Industrial Applications

overview: KORVANTO KAO CRUDE is a naturally occurring kaolin clay (China Clay) selectively mined and supplied in its raw, unprocessed form. Composed primarily of hydrated aluminum silicate, it is valued for its natural whiteness, plasticity, fine particle structure, and low abrasiveness, making it an important raw material across numerous industrial applications.

Carefully sourced to ensure consistent quality, KORVANTO KAO CRUDE serves as a versatile mineral for ceramic bodies, paints, paper, rubber, plastics, sanitaryware, and construction materials. Its excellent workability, firing characteristics, and filler properties contribute to improved product performance and manufacturing efficiency.
Available in dried lump form, the material is suitable for further processing, grinding, levigation, calcination, or direct industrial use depending on application requirements.
product_advantages: Improves Plasticity in Ceramic Bodies

overview: KORVANTO KAO LEVIGATED NOODLES are premium-grade water-washed and refined kaolin products manufactured through a controlled levigation process that removes grit, iron-bearing impurities, and other unwanted minerals. Supplied in noodle form with controlled moisture content, these grades offer excellent plasticity, workability, whiteness, and consistency required by modern ceramic manufacturers.

Designed for ceramic bodies, sanitaryware, vitrified tiles, porcelain, tableware, and refractory applications, the product provides superior molding characteristics, improved green strength, and enhanced fired properties. Its uniform composition and low impurity levels contribute to better production efficiency and high-quality finished products.

products.name: Korvanto Hydrous Kaolin
products.subtitle: Hydrous Kaolin Powder for Paint, Paper, Plastic, Rubber, Ink & Industrial Applications

overview: KORVANTO KAO HYDROUS is a premium-grade water-washed kaolin produced from carefully selected deposits and processed to achieve high purity, excellent whiteness, controlled particle size, and superior dispersion characteristics. Composed primarily of naturally hydrated kaolinite, this product retains its original crystalline structure, making it an ideal functional filler, extender, and performance additive for a wide range of industrial applications.

Its fine particle size, chemical inertness, low abrasiveness, and high brightness make it suitable for paints, coatings, paper, plastics, rubber, printing inks, agrochemicals, ceramics, adhesives, and specialty formulations. KORVANTO KAO HYDROUS contributes to improved surface finish, opacity, gloss, printability, and mechanical performance while maintaining formulation stability.
Manufactured under strict quality controls, it delivers consistent performance and reliable results across diverse industries.

overview: KORVANTO KAO SPRAY is a premium spray dried kaolin produced by atomizing refined kaolin slurry in a controlled drying process. The resulting granules offer uniform moisture content, excellent flow properties, and a consistent particle structure tailored for modern ceramic pressing and body formulation.

Designed for ceramic bodies, pressed tiles, and sanitaryware applications, this grade delivers reliable pressing performance, improved green strength, easy blending in ceramic formulations, and uniform composition for high-quality finished products.

Manufactured from a high-purity refined kaolin base with low impurity levels and strict quality controls, KORVANTO KAO SPRAY supports efficient ceramic production, consistent batch-to-batch performance, and export-ready supply for tile and sanitaryware manufacturers worldwide.

products.name: Korvanto Calcined Kaolin
products.subtitle: Calcined Kaolin for Paints, Plastics, Rubber, Paper, Wire & Cable Insulation Applications

overview: KORVANTO KAO CALCINED is a premium-grade anhydrous aluminum silicate produced by carefully calcining high-purity kaolin under controlled temperatures. The calcination process removes chemically bound water and modifies the kaolin crystal structure, resulting in enhanced whiteness, opacity, brightness, electrical insulation properties, thermal stability, and improved functional performance.

Engineered for demanding industrial applications, KORVANTO KAO CALCINED serves as a high-performance extender, filler, reinforcing agent, and pigment substitute in paints, coatings, plastics, rubber, paper, wire & cable compounds, printing inks, technical ceramics, and specialty formulations.

Its excellent dispersibility, low moisture content, controlled particle size distribution, and superior optical properties make it a preferred choice for manufacturers seeking improved product performance and cost optimization.

products.name: Korvanto Meta Kaolin
products.subtitle: High-Reactivity Metakaolin for Concrete, Cement, Construction Chemicals & Industrial Applications

overview: KORVANTO KAO METAKAOLIN is a highly reactive pozzolanic material produced by the controlled calcination of high-purity kaolin clay. During this process, kaolinite is transformed into an amorphous aluminosilicate structure with exceptional reactivity, making it a valuable supplementary cementitious material for construction and industrial applications.

Engineered to enhance strength, durability, and long-term performance, KORVANTO KAO METAKAOLIN reacts with calcium hydroxide generated during cement hydration to form additional cementitious compounds. This results in denser microstructures, reduced permeability, improved chemical resistance, and superior mechanical properties.

In addition to construction applications, the product is widely used in paints, pigments, rubber, plastics, wire & cable compounds, and specialty industrial formulations where high whiteness, fine particle size, and reinforcing properties are required.

products.name: Korvanto Ball Clay
products.subtitle: Premium Ball Clay for Ceramics, Sanitaryware, Tiles & Refractory Applications

overview: KORVANTO CLAY BALL is a high-quality, fine-grained clay renowned for its exceptional plasticity, strong binding characteristics, and excellent workability. Composed primarily of kaolinite along with naturally occurring quartz and mica, it serves as a critical raw material in ceramic, sanitaryware, porcelain, tile, refractory, and technical ceramic applications.

Carefully selected and processed to ensure consistency, KORVANTO CLAY BALL enhances shaping, molding, casting, and extrusion performance while providing excellent green strength and reliable firing characteristics. Its superior plasticity allows manufacturers to produce complex shapes, thin-walled products, and high-quality ceramic bodies with improved durability and surface finish.
Designed for modern ceramic manufacturing, it offers consistent performance across a wide range of industrial applications.

products.name: Korvanto Laterite
products.subtitle: Laterite for Cement, Construction & Infrastructure Applications

overview: KORVANTO LAT is a naturally occurring iron and alumina-rich lateritic mineral selectively mined and processed for use in cement manufacturing, construction materials, road infrastructure, and industrial applications. Formed through prolonged weathering of rocks in tropical environments, laterite offers excellent durability, weather resistance, and consistent chemical composition.

With its high iron and alumina content, KORVANTO LAT serves as a valuable corrective material in cement raw mix formulations while also finding applications in road construction, building materials, landscaping, and environmental projects. Available in lump, crushed, or powder form, it provides a cost-effective and sustainable mineral solution for large-scale industrial and infrastructure developments.

products.name: Korvanto Chamotte
products.subtitle: Chamotte (Refractory Clay) for Refractory, Ceramic & High-Temperature Applications

overview: KORVANTO CHAM is a premium-grade calcined refractory clay (Chamotte) produced from carefully selected kaolinitic clays and fired at high temperatures to develop exceptional thermal stability, strength, and dimensional consistency. The calcination process transforms the clay into a highly stable refractory aggregate capable of withstanding extreme temperatures and thermal cycling.

Processed through advanced crushing, screening, and grading systems, KORVANTO CHAM is available in various particle sizes and alumina grades to meet the requirements of refractory manufacturers, ceramic producers, foundries, steel plants, cement kilns, and other high-temperature industries.

Its superior resistance to thermal shock, abrasion, shrinkage, and chemical degradation makes it an ideal raw material for fire bricks, castables, refractory mortars, kiln furniture, insulation materials, and technical ceramics.

products.name: Korvanto Bauxite
products.subtitle: Calcined Bauxite for Refractory, Abrasive & High-Temperature Industrial Applications

overview: KORVANTO BAUX is a premium-grade calcined bauxite produced by carefully calcining high-quality bauxite ore at controlled temperatures to remove moisture and volatile compounds, resulting in a dense, hard, and highly refractory material with elevated alumina content.

Renowned for its exceptional hardness, thermal stability, chemical resistance, and low thermal expansion characteristics, KORVANTO BAUX is widely used in refractory manufacturing, abrasive applications, welding consumables, and other demanding industrial processes operating under extreme temperatures and abrasive conditions.

Our calcined bauxite grades are manufactured to provide consistent alumina content, controlled impurities, and reliable performance for steel plants, cement kilns, glass furnaces, foundries, refractory producers, and abrasive manufacturers worldwide.

products.name: Korvanto Carbon
products.subtitle: Lustrous Carbon Additive for Green Sand Foundry Applications

overview: KORVANTO CARBO is a premium-quality lustrous carbon additive manufactured from carefully selected carbonaceous materials and processed to deliver superior performance in green sand molding systems. Designed specifically for ferrous foundries, it improves casting surface finish, reduces sand-related defects, and enhances molding sand performance.

When exposed to molten metal temperatures, KORVANTO CARBO generates a reducing gaseous atmosphere and forms a lustrous carbon layer at the mold-metal interface. This protective carbon film acts as a non-wetting barrier between molten metal and molding sand, minimizing metal penetration, sand adhesion, burn-on defects, and surface irregularities.
Engineered for modern foundry operations, KORVANTO CARBO helps improve casting quality, reduce rejection rates, enhance sand recyclability, and optimize overall production efficiency.

Reduces Sand Burn-On and Metal Penetration
Minimizes Scabbing, Erosion, and Surface Defects

Enhances Mold Collapsibility
Reduces Fettling and Finishing Costs
Lowers Foundry Rejection Rates
Improves Green Sand Performance
Reduces Fresh Sand Consumption
Supports Higher Sand Recyclability
Improves Process Consistency and Productivity
Helps Reduce Bentonite Consumption in Optimized Systems
